metadata.description: Canonical source for skills.sh skills and Claude Code marketplace plugins.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create a safe, intentional git commit. Detect the repository's commit convention, stage only the intended changes, write a concise subject, add a brief body when useful, and commit without rewriting history.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

plugins.name: review-changes
plugins.description: Review code, audit changes, check a PR/commit, or review a design/architecture document. Executes directly with grouped severity findings (critical/high/medium/positive) — no brainstorming, no interactive dialogue.

plugins.name: web-fetch-to-markdown
plugins.description: Fetches and normalizes http(s) web pages into clean Markdown for LLM ingestion. Use when a task includes a URL, needs to fetch docs or asks to convert web docs/articles/pages into Markdown for summarizing, quoting, diffing, or saving.

plugins.name: pi-upgrade
plugins.description: Check for available upgrades to the pi coding agent framework by comparing the current @mariozechner/pi-* version in package.json against releases on badlogic/pi-mono.

plugins.name: web-design-guidelines
plugins.description: Design, implement, and review web interfaces with shared UI guidance

plugins.name: react-testing-techniques
plugins.description: Best practices for testing React components with Vitest, React Testing Library, and MSW
